Segments Ready

Assalamu Alaikum {requester_name},

Alignment segments for {reciter_name} have been extracted and a draft pull request is ready for your review.

{pr_link}

Accept Your Invite

A collaborator invitation has been sent to your GitHub account (@{github_username}). Please accept the invite, then comment /confirm on the issue to get assigned. After that, refer to these guides to get started:

  • Contributing Guide — how to review and fix segments
  • Inspector README — how to use the Inspector tool

Once you're done reviewing, mark the PR as Ready for review.
